note: Red-team hidden-competition and reality-check sources, fetched/searched 2026-07-03. IDs cited as [RT-V04-xx] in REDTEAM_V04.md. Merge into 90_BIBLIOGRAPHY/sources.json at next wave update.

entries.title: MV Electrical Heating Systems - Chromalox Case Study (DirectConnect, UL 347C certified MV SCR control panel, 4160 V multi-MW)
entries.claim: Chromalox DirectConnect is a third-party-certified (UL 347C) medium-voltage SCR control panel line, multi-MW at 4160 V - the 'empty merchant MV controller slot' claim is false.

entries.title: Advanced SCR Power Controllers
entries.claim: Full merchant SCR power-controller catalog incl. MV panel options; ~99% efficiency claims.

entries.title: Thyro-PX Power Controller (up to 5000 A / 1000 V)
entries.claim: Merchant SCR controller explicitly for transformer-coupled and resistive furnace loads in glass/metal/ceramic - the LV-side incumbency below the MV tier.

entries.title: POWERGLIDE controller; Watlow power-switching family (POWER SERIES, ASPYRE, QPAC, Eurotherm EFit/EPower)
entries.claim: 50+ years of merchant SCR controllers; Watlow also owns Eurotherm line - crowded merchant field.

entries.title: Thyristor (SCR) Control of Molybdenum Disilicide Heaters
entries.claim: MoSi2 cold resistance is near short circuit (~10x cold-to-hot swing); standard practice is low-voltage supply via tapped isolation transformer with thyristor on the primary - elements never see MV.

entries.title: MoSi2 Element application controllers
entries.claim: Element-specific controller firmware for MoSi2/SiC (current limit, transformer modes) is already a shipping merchant product category.

entries.title: SiC Heating Elements - Lifetime (aging/resistance increase)
entries.claim: SiC element resistance rises steadily with age (oxidation), requiring voltage headroom/transformer taps - power chain is element-chemistry-specific, not universal.

entries.title: Prothal TH: MW-sized electric process gas heater (100 kW to hundreds of MW, outlet to 1100 C, +/-1 C)
entries.claim: The 'element supplier (Kanthal class)' named in V04's TRL path is itself a vertically integrated system vendor bundling elements + power + controls at MW scale.

entries.title: ELECTRA project: Kanthal achieves calcination temperatures with electric heating (with Heidelberg Materials; EUR 20M Horizon Europe, 17 partners)
entries.claim: The flagship EU cement-electrification pilot already pairs the cement major with the element/system maker - no merchant controller slot in the consortium.

entries.title: ECem electric calciner technologies (infrared + inductive prototype calciners)
entries.claim: V04's named channel partner FLSmidth develops electric-calciner heating IN-HOUSE (IR and induction, Innovation Fund Denmark); ECoClay full-scale clay-calcination construction targeted from end-2025.

entries.title: Coolbrook and ABB expand partnership with investment
entries.claim: Coolbrook RDH power electronics = ABB motors + variable-speed drives, with ABB as investor - the >1000 C rotodynamic path buys drives, not resistive controllers.

entries.title: 英杰电气(300820.SZ)深度报告: 电源龙头引领国产替代 (Yingjie Electric deep report: industrial power-supply leader)
entries.claim: Yingjie/Injet ships thyristor power controllers and multi-MW polysilicon reduction-furnace power supplies (12-48 rod pairs, ~70% share) - i.e., China already has a listed merchant vendor of >1000 C resistive-heating power systems.

entries.title: 深耕'工业的心脏', 英杰电气持续创新 (Yingjie Electric: industrial power supplies)
entries.claim: Corroborates Yingjie product breadth: thyristor controllers, induction-heating supplies, single-crystal/polysilicon furnace supplies.

entries.title: Electrochemical Synthesis of Low-Carbon Cement (Sublime Systems)
entries.claim: Sublime (and Electra) route is AMBIENT-temperature electrochemistry - these celebrated 'cement electrification' startups buy rectifiers (C39 territory), not >1000 C resistive controllers; shrinks the mapped TAM.

entries.title: Update on China, April 2025 (Anhui Conch 2024: revenue -36% to $12.4bn, net profit -25% to $1.01bn)
entries.claim: Chinese cement margins collapsed through 2024-25 (price war, overcapacity) - the largest buyer base has the weakest discretionary capex.

entries.title: 高温回转焙烧窑(煅烧窑) - 电加热型 400-1000 C (electric-heated rotary calciner)
entries.publisher: Jiangsu Zhenxing Drying Equipment 江苏振兴干燥设备
entries.claim: Chinese OEMs already sell integrated electric rotary calciners (400-1000 C) with heating + control systems bundled; electromagnetic rotary-kiln heating retrofits also marketed - domestic tier is not empty, it is integrated.

entries.title: Outlook for the Cement Industry in 2026: Moderate Demand Decline with Continued Profit Pressure
entries.claim: Sector profitability remains pressured into 2026; loss-making enterprises widespread - WTP for $250K-1M/zone discretionary electrification hardware is unevidenced.
